title: Potion Blink
description: This is a mod that gives you a warning when your potions is about to end
body:
This mod enhances gameplay by alerting the player when the Strength potion effect is about to wear off. As the effect nears expiration, a prominent, blinking warning appears above the hotbar, ensuring you never miss the opportunity to renew your buff during crucial game moments.

**The warning is visually clear and attention-grabbing, making it ideal for PvP, boss fights, and adventure maps.**

**By displaying the alert above the hotbar, the notification is directly in your line of sight, minimizing missed cues.**

**The mod is lightweight and integrates seamlessly with Minecraft’s UI for a smooth experience.**

**It helps players plan their moves, avoid vulnerability periods, and maintain their combat edge.**

**This mod is especially useful for competitive players, resource managers, or anyone wanting to maximize potion efficiency and gameplay awareness.**
[This Is The Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a0479908240e5351a0a0b1ef64641add7134eb.png)
